dag.description: XGBoost training pipeline with stratified sampling and model evaluation

metadata.name: xgboost_training_with_evaluation_stratified
metadata.description: XGBoost training pipeline with stratified sampling and model evaluation

agent_context.when_to_use: When training data has severe class imbalance (e.g., <5% positive rate) and stratified sampling is needed to balance classes for better model learning. Common in abuse detection where abusers are a small fraction of all buyers.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: If class balance is acceptable (>10% minority class), use training_with_evaluation. If you need full e2e pipeline (use complete_e2e with stratified sampling configured). If using scale_pos_weight in XGBoost instead of data-level sampling.
differentiators: StratifiedSampling step between preprocessing and training
Handles class imbalance at data level rather than algorithm level
Evaluation uses original (non-stratified) data for realistic metrics
Used when scale_pos_weight alone is insufficient

prerequisites.how: At least 1000 positive samples in training set

common_pitfalls: Do NOT stratify evaluation data - it must reflect real distribution
Over-sampling can cause overfitting to minority class
Consider scale_pos_weight as alternative before using this DAG

tried_scale_pos_weight?.yes: USE THIS DAG if still underperforming

need_registration?.yes: Use complete_e2e with stratified sampling configured
